title: SUICIDE PREVENTION Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 12. SUICIDE PREVENTION

PART I. GENERAL PROVISIONS

§801. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Suicide Prevention Act".

            Acts 2018, No. 450, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 12.  SUICIDE PREVENTION
PART I.  GENERAL PROVISIONS
§801.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Suicide Prevention
Act".
Acts 2018, No. 450, §1.
